name: Date Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, margarine, and chopped dates.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly.
3. Boil for 2 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and add the cereal and nuts.
5. Stir in vanilla.
6. Cool, then shape into 42 little drops.
Note: Each drop is equivalent to 1/2 fruit, 1/2 bread, and 1/2 fat exchange with a caloric value of 95 calories, 10 grams of carbohydrates, 1 gram of protein, 6 grams of fat, 66 milligrams of sodium, and 102 milligrams of potassium.
